india_trends.title: Foreign universities drive hiring boom in India
india_trends.summary: India's educational landscape is on the cusp of transformation as NEP 2020 invites a host of foreign universities to set up campuses. This influx is anticipated to generate 400+ faculty roles, opening the door for Indian scholars based overseas to return home and bring their experiences into play.

india_trends.title: US stocks: Dow Jones plummets over 500 points after Trump orders US Navy to kill any boat laying mines in Strait of Hormuz
india_trends.summary: US markets experienced a sharp decline on Thursday. US President Donald Trump issued a directive for the Navy to engage any boats laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz. This action heightened existing tensions in the region. US forces also intercepted Iran-linked vessels in the Indian Ocean. Investor

india_trends.title: Nasdaq to launch new products ahead of extended trading hours plan
india_trends.summary: Nasdaq is launching new products for extended U.S. stock trading. This move will allow trading for 23 hours a day, five days a week. The expansion aims to provide greater global access to popular U.S. stocks. This change is expected to begin on December 6, pending regulatory approval. The new system

india_trends.title: Vehicles, copper, steel drive 4.86% rise in FY26 engineering exports to $122.4 billion
india_trends.summary: March brought challenges for Indian engineering exports, particularly to the UAE and Saudi Arabia, where shipments were significantly hampered by the ongoing crisis in West Asia impacting cargo routes.

india_trends.title: Bharat Coking Coal announces scheme to encourage higher coal offtake, cut costs for power consumers
india_trends.summary: Bharat Coking Coal Ltd, a subsidiary of Coal India, has launched a new scheme. This initiative aims to boost coal purchases by power companies and lower their expenses. The plan encourages increased coal lifting, especially via rail, to ensure steady electricity supply and support India's energy sel

india_trends.title: West Asia crisis: Engineering exports dip 66.8% to UAE; 45% to Saudi Arabia in March
india_trends.summary: Indian engineering exports to the UAE and Saudi Arabia saw significant drops in March. This decline was attributed to the West Asia crisis affecting cargo ship movements. Despite these challenges, the overall engineering sector experienced growth in March and throughout the 2025-26 fiscal year. The

india_trends.title: Reliance Industries share price: Rs 1 lakh crore eroded as RIL tanks 5% - MSN
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries share price: Rs 1 lakh crore eroded as RIL tanks 5%    MSN

india_trends.title: Intel Stock climbs over 4% ahead of Q1 earnings report, analysts predict fall in revenue
india_trends.summary: Wall Street anticipates adjusted earnings of 1 cent per share—a 92% plunge year-over-year—alongside a fall in revenue to $12.4 billion

india_trends.title: Ryan Roslansky steps down as LinkedIn CEO, signals next phase under Satya Nadella’s AI push
india_trends.summary: Ryan Roslansky has confirmed that Dan Shapero will take charge as CEO of LinkedIn, highlighting the company’s focus on scaling talent amid rapid AI transformation.

india_trends.title: RBI imposes penalty on Ebix Payment Services, 2 others over non-compliance
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has taken action against Ebix Payment Services, Dr Babasaheb Ambedkar Nagari Sahakari Bank, and Hardoi Jilla Sahkari Bank, penalizing them for regulatory non-compliance.

india_trends.title: Reliance Enterprise Intelligence appoints Parminder Singh as Chief Executive Officer
india_trends.summary: Reliance Enterprise Intelligence Ltd has appointed Parminder Singh as CEO to accelerate enterprise AI adoption in India. With Reliance holding a 70% stake and Facebook the remainder, Singh aims to leverage Meta's AI and Reliance's infrastructure to create a leading AI partner for Indian businesses.

india_trends.title: Flexible workspace firms clinch big deals in Q4
india_trends.summary: Flexible workspace operators secured major office deals in the March quarter. Smartworks and WeWork led with substantial space leases across cities. Demand is rising, especially from large enterprises and global capability centers. This indicates a structural shift in office space strategy. The sect

india_trends.title: Azad Engineering inaugurates 7,600 sqm manufacturing facility in Hyderabad
india_trends.summary: Azad Engineering has opened a new 7,600 sq meter lean manufacturing facility in Hyderabad. This advanced facility will support global energy technology firm Baker Hughes. It is Azad Engineering's fourth dedicated facility, reflecting its aggressive expansion to meet global demand. The partnership wi

india_trends.title: RBI approves Vivek Tripathi's elevation as executive director at AU Small Finance Bank
india_trends.summary: AU Small Finance Bank has welcomed Vivek Tripathi as its new Executive Director, approved by the Reserve Bank of India for a three-year term. Transitioning from his role as chief credit officer, Tripathi will officially assume his responsibilities this Friday.

india_trends.title: IKS Health acquires TruBridge Inc for upto $565 million
india_trends.summary: The deal, through IKS Health’s US subsidiary, will be funded by a loan of up to $670 million secured for a five-year term from Citibank, Deutsche Bank and JPMorgan Chase.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold drops $53/oz, silver down $3.7/oz as oil rebound fuels inflation fears
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver prices declined on 23 April, with gold futures at $4,700 and silver at $74.23, driven by rising crude oil prices and a stronger US dollar. Renewed geopolitical tensions in the Middle East heightened inflation fears, impacting investor sentiment.

india_trends.title: US stocks: American Airlines dims 2026 forecast as high fuel costs hurt margins
india_trends.summary: American Airlines cut its 2026 profit forecast on Thursday, pushing the lower-end of the range to a loss, as sky-high jet fuel costs driven by the Iran war hurt profit margins.

india_trends.title: Aurum PropTech crosses Rs 500 crore annualised recurring revenue
india_trends.summary: Aurum PropTech reported strong revenue growth and crossed a major ARR milestone while posting consecutive profitable quarters. Margin expansion, improved unit economics, and platform scaling supported performance despite ongoing investments and acquisitions across its proptech ecosystem

india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Friday
india_trends.summary: Equity markets fell for a second session as IT, auto and financial stocks weighed on sentiment. Nifty and Sensex declined, volatility rose, and analysts highlighted key technical levels amid mixed global cues and selective stock buying interest

india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Friday - The Economic Times
india_trends.summary: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Friday    The Economic Times
